productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men M Rsp Tee White T-Shirts
description: Composition White short Sleeve sleeved tennis t-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a Round Neck neck with cut out detailing and fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand name and logo Printed on the centre of the chest, three stripes Printed on the sleeves in silver signifying the adidas logo, football patterns on a panel at the back and engineered with ClimaCool technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Do not dry clean Designed for the tennis pro that you are, this white t-shirt from adidas is exactly what you need to look great and feel comfortable all through the game and even off the court. The ClimaCool technology is sure to keep you free of sweat as you drive the crowd crazy with your powerful aces. Concentrate on your game, and let the tee look after you. Pair it with tracks or Short Sleeves for the perfect look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
